description: Mid-11th-century letter from Umm Faḍā'il, a widow in Fustat, to a family friend, Abū Zikrī b. Yosef (Yehuda b. Yosef Rosh ha-Seder), in the West. The letter deals with her son Fakhr's intended travel to Sicily. She requests that the addresee assist him. She mentions a power of attorney document that she gave to her son, so that he will dispose of their remaining property in Sicily. She also mentions an ongoing divorce of her daughter. Information from Ben-Sasson's edition via FGP.
description_he: מכתב מאמצע המאה ה-11 מאם פדאאיל, אלמנה בפסטאט, לידידה אבו זכרי בן יוסף במערב. עוסקת בנסיעת בנה פח'ר לסיציליה, ייפוי כוח לנכסים שם, וגירושי בתה.
